---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or gap this feature would address. What are you trying to do that you currently can't?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible — CLI flag, new skill, new dependency group, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've already considered and why they fall short.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete investigative scenario where this feature would be used. Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, links to similar tools, or any other context.
